credit-rating.te_meta_desc: Standard & Poor's credit rating for Slovenia stands at AA with stable outlook. Moody's credit rating for Slovenia was last set at A2 with stable outlook. DBRS' credit rating for Slovenia was last reported at AA (low) with stable outlook. In general, a credit rating is used by sovereign wealth funds, pension funds and other investors to gauge the credit worthiness of Slovenia thus having a big impact on the country's borrowing costs. This page includes the government debt credit rating for Slovenia as reported by major credit rating agencies.
